name: @borjie/ethics-framework
description: SOTA ethics framework — codified principles (Asilomar, NIST RMF, IEEE P7000, EU AI Act), consent management (incl. parental for minors), vulnerable-population safeguards (TZ Land Act, KE Rental Housing Act, ZA RHA, FHA), GDPR Art 22 right-to-explanation with counterfactuals, Brignull dark-pattern detector (14 types), surveillance-device consent registry, WCAG 2.2 AA accessibility checks. Pure functions; composes fairness-eval + compliance-pack without editing them.
